G

Game - Class in <Unnamed>
This class builds the piccross UI and contains the controller for the UI to interact with the game logic.
Game() - Constructor for class Game
 
Game.Controller - Class in <Unnamed>
The class holds the handler for game grids action events.
GameLogic - Class in <Unnamed>
This class creates the game logic for the Piccross game.
GameLogic() - Constructor for class GameLogic
Constructor to initialize a game instance
GamePreloader - Class in <Unnamed>
Creates the Preloader splash screen for the Piccross Game.
GamePreloader() - Constructor for class GamePreloader
 
getGameOver() - Method in class GameLogic
Returns game over status.
getHHints(int) - Method in class GameLogic
Returns the HHint at index
getMark() - Method in class Game
Get the status of the mark.
getMistake() - Method in class GameLogic
Returns whether the user has made a mistake.
getScore() - Method in class GameLogic
Gets current score of the game.
getVHints(int) - Method in class GameLogic
Returns the VHint at index
